title: hieracium brevifolium subsp. brachyphyllum
intro: Hieracium brevifolium subsp. brachyphyllum, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Hieracium brevifolium subsp. brachyphyllum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
